notes: SketchUp Viewer for Desktop discontinued; "Beginning April 22, 2025, SketchUp Viewer for Desktop will no longer be available to download" (help.sketchup.com/en/sketchup-viewer/sketchup-viewer-desktop). No public macOS dmg exists anymore; Installomator scrape now returns nothing. Reason: discontinued.

Only an unversioned always-latest dmg: https://storage.googleapis.com/soundlyapp/Soundly.dmg (HTTP 200, app/x-apple-diskimage, last-modified 2026-06-05). No public version feed/appcast (storage.googleapis.com/soundlyapp/*.xml and getsoundly version endpoints 403/404). Calendar version only on 3rd-party trackers (macupdater: 2025.12.23). No versioned URL + no livecheck. Reason: unversioned.

Only an unversioned always-latest dmg: https://download.splashtop.com/sos/SplashtopSOS.dmg (HTTP 200). Splashtop docs state the link "will always download the latest version"; no per-version URL. Latest noted v3.8.0.7 (support article, Apr 2026) but no machine-readable version feed. On-demand attended-support tool. Reason: unversioned.

Universal dmg. Stable alias https://app.strongdm.com/downloads/client/darwin 307-redirects to https://downloads.strongdm.com/builds/desktop/23.74.0/darwin-universal-full/AE48C598EF267EBBAE9EC238113422A66DD0846E/SDM-23.74.0.dmg (HTTP 200; content-disposition filename="SDM-23.74.0.dmg"). Version 23.74.0. Real URL contains a per-build hash segment (not derivable from version) so no stable versioned url template; custom. Livecheck: :header_match on the alias, regex SDM-(\d+(?:\.\d+)+)\.dmg. homepage https://www.strongdm.com (200). artifact=dmg, universal.

Gated. Installomator source page (servicedesk.surf.nl/wiki/.../74225443) is login-only (Confluence REST returns authorized:false / 404). SURF's public "Getting the Nextcloud desktop app" page (205193802) now directs users to the generic Nextcloud desktop client (nextcloud.com / Mac App Store), not a SURF-branded pkg. arm64 client noted v5.3.2 (Feb 2025) but no public SURF-branded versioned pkg URL. Reason: gated.

pkgInDmg (nested pkg). pkgInDmg (nested pkg). Version 3.22.11 read from release-notes page (first [0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)+ match = 3.22.11; "Things for Mac 3.22.11"). URL unversioned but version concrete + page_match livecheck. Download host static.culturedcode.com != homepage host -> verified: auto-added. No existing 'things' cask (formulae.brew.sh + repo both 404; only thingsmacsandboxhelper exists).

Arch-split zips via electron-style RELEASES.json feed (not latest-mac.yml). arm64: https://desktopapp.trint.com/updates/darwin/arm64/Trint-darwin-arm64-0.1.22.zip ; x64: https://desktopapp.trint.com/updates/darwin/x64/Trint-darwin-x64-0.1.22.zip (both HTTP 200). Livecheck: :json on https://desktopapp.trint.com/updates/darwin/arm64/RELEASES.json field currentRelease. artifact=zip. homepage https://trint.com (200).

Only an unversioned dmg https://downloads.ultraedit.com/main/uc/mac/UltraCompare.dmg (HTTP 200 but last-modified 2024-05-15, stale; no content-disposition version). Versioned dmg patterns (UltraCompare-27.7.dmg etc.) all 404. Version scheme ambiguous across sources (Mac changelog shows 27.7; vendor "UE 2025.0"). No reliable versioned URL or machine-readable livecheck. Reason: unversioned.

pkgInZip (nested pkg). Verified live: https://bin.extensis.com/UTC-7-0-13-M.zip (HTTP 200, zip), linked from https://www.extensis.com/support/universal-type-server-7/ . Version 7.0.13 -> URL uses DASH form UTC-7-0-13-M.zip (dots replaced by dashes), so a plain {v} (dotted) cannot map -> custom. Livecheck: :page_match on the support page, regex UTC-(\d+(?:-\d+)+)-M\.zip then convert dashes->dots. artifact=zip (nested pkgInZip; inner pkg resolved on-Mac). homepage https://www.extensis.com (200).

Arch-split GitHub release dmgs (v3.0.9, repo madchops1/visualz-releases): Visualz-3.0.9-arm64.dmg and Visualz-3.0.9-x64.dmg (arm64 dmg verified HTTP 200 via release-assets redirect). Stable url template: https://github.com/madchops1/visualz-releases/releases/download/v#{version}/Visualz-#{version}-arm64.dmg (and -x64.dmg). Plain pkg via stable redirect: https://api.vivi.io/mac 302->https://downloads.vivi.io/app/Vivi-3.10.5.pkg (HTTP 200, octet-stream). Version 3.10.5.
